title: Calvin Quate
body: Calvin Forrest Quate (December 7, 1923 – July 6, 2019) was an American electrical engineer and physicist best known for his contributions to microscopy.  He was on the faculty of Stanford University from 1961 until his retirement in 2004.
categories: Fellows of the Royal Microscopical Society
Foreign members of the Royal Society
Members of the Norwegian Academy of Science and Letters
